summary: Tested iteration 34 features: Influencer commission calculation explanation (15% of HispaloShop's 18%), payment schedule with 15-day availability, CartPage i18n translations. All features working correctly.
passed_tests: Influencer Dashboard shows commission calculation explanation: '15% de comisión se calcula sobre la ganancia de HispaloShop (18% del pedido)'
Influencer Dashboard shows example calculation: Venta €100 → Vendedor €82, HispaloShop €18, Tu comisión €2.70 (15% de €18)
Influencer Dashboard shows 'Calendario de Pagos' card with available_to_withdraw, available_soon, next_payment_date
Payment Schedule shows 'Disponible para retirar' with amount and 'Ya han pasado 15 días' text
Payment Schedule shows 'Disponible pronto' with amount and 'En los próximos 7 días' text
Payment Schedule shows 'Próximo pago disponible' with date and days remaining
Payment policy text: 'Las comisiones generadas se pueden cobrar 15 días después de cada venta'
Recent Commissions table has 'Pago disponible' column showing availability status
Commissions show '✓ Disponible' when payment_available_date has passed
Commissions show 'X días' countdown when payment is not yet available
InfluencerAnalytics component shows 'Cómo funcionan tus comisiones' section
InfluencerAnalytics explains: 'HispaloShop cobra 18% de cada venta'
InfluencerAnalytics explains: 'Tú recibes el 15% de esa comisión'
InfluencerAnalytics shows 'Calendario de pagos' with 15-day unlock explanation
CartPage title translates: 'Shopping Cart' (EN) / 'Carrito de Compra' (ES)
CartPage verified badge translates: 'Email verified' (EN) / 'Email verificado' (ES)
CartPage empty message translates: 'Your cart is empty' (EN) / 'Tu carrito está vacío' (ES)
CartPage continue shopping translates: 'Continue Shopping' (EN) / 'Seguir Comprando' (ES)
API /api/influencer/dashboard returns payment_schedule with available_to_withdraw, available_soon, next_payment_date
API /api/influencer/dashboard returns recent_commissions with payment_available_date field
API /api/influencer/dashboard returns platform_commission: 0.18 (18%)
seed_data_creation: Created test influencer with 15% commission, discount code TESTITER34, and 3 test commissions with different payment_available_date values
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 34 features all working. Influencer dashboard shows commission calculation explanation (15% of HispaloShop's 18% fee), payment schedule with 15-day availability, and recent commissions with payment availability status. CartPage i18n translations verified for Spanish and English. Note: Influencer discount_code_id must be set (not discount_code directly) for the dashboard to show the code and analytics section.

influencer_commission_explanation.details: Dashboard shows '15% de comisión se calcula sobre la ganancia de HispaloShop (18% del pedido)' with example: Venta €100 → Tu comisión €2.70

payment_schedule_card.details: Shows 'Calendario de Pagos' with available_to_withdraw, available_soon, next_payment_date and 15-day policy

recent_commissions_payment_available.details: Table shows 'Pago disponible' column with '✓ Disponible' or 'X días' countdown

influencer_analytics_commission_info.details: InfluencerAnalytics shows 'Cómo funcionan tus comisiones' with 18%/15% explanation and 15-day unlock

cartpage_i18n_spanish.details: CartPage shows Spanish translations: 'Carrito de Compra', 'Email verificado', 'Tu carrito está vacío'

cartpage_i18n_english.details: CartPage shows English translations: 'Shopping Cart', 'Email verified', 'Your cart is empty'
